title: maranta polystachya
intro: Maranta polystachya, also known as the prayer plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Maranta polystachya include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and improving digestive health. The herbal preparations of Maranta polystachya include teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or applying the crushed leaves to affected areas.
